name: Suspicious Rundll32 Activity Detected
description: Detects suspicious `rundll32.exe` activity based on command-line arguments. Adversaries may abuse `rundll32.exe` to proxy code executions and avoid triggering security tools that may not monitor the process due to allowlists. This is a common defense evasion and execution technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious `rundll32.exe` process was detected with the command line **{command}**. This is a strong indicator of **Proxy Execution** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1218.011**) where an adversary is attempting to use a legitimate Windows binary to execute malicious code and evade security defenses. The process was launched by **{parent_process}** under the user **{user}**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious code.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line of the suspicious rundll32.exe process.

parameters.name: parent_process
parameters.description: The parent process that launched rundll32.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
